output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?calendar ?label WHERE {
  ?calendar rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?label) , 'calendar'))
  .
  FILTER(! CONTAINS(STR(?label) , 'date'))
  .
  FILTER(! CONTAINS(STR(?label) , 'month'))
  .
  FILTER(! CONTAINS(STR(?label) , ' of the '))
  .
  FILTER(! CONTAINS(STR(?label) , 'desk'))
  .
  FILTER(STR(?label) != 'calendar')
}
LIMIT 10
